title: Fel's Smart Arsenal
description: A mod that adds automated turrets to your world.
body:
![aww](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9613eaad158b53e9b698d915546232ef1b9abd31.png)

**Fel's Smart Arsenal** is a simple mod that adds automatic turrets for base defense, structure defense, etc.

## Features:

- Basic turrets
- Easy crafting
- Easy to set up

Requires [GeckoLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib) in order to work.

**Notes:** Turrets needs **batteries** in order to work, **crouch + right click** to turn On/Off turret. By default turrets will target only **monster type entities**, to edit turret behavior you must install **SARA**'s module with the respective **chips** inside the module. You can repair turrets using the **wrench**. The mod is beta so it can have some unpolished/unfinished stuff. You can report, suggest or ask stuff related on my [<Discord>](https://discord.gg/KX74cvh4vn).

**If you think my work worth and want to support me you can do it on**

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/P5P71NNJLL)
